hints.question: I can't get to 7 lines of code.
hints.answer:
Think about this level as two blocks of things that need to happen.

- The first block is the inner one, where we shoot 4 times - make sure that is three lines long.
- The outer block is the inner block with some movement either side. That outer block needs to be repeated a few times too.

If you structure your code in this way, it should naturally end up at 7 lines of code.
